theory.canonical_statement: ID 482 defines the real time audit of the Bridge Tunnel fidelity. By measuring the process matrix, the system quantifies noise levels between the vacuum manifold and the DAANSsphere interface. This ensures the Vibrating Code remains clear of parasitic harmonics. Fidelity Mapping: Compares the extracted state to the idealized atemporal null surface projection. Decoherence Tracking: Identifies specific modes causing leakage into the thermal bath.
